name: Zluri SaaS Management Platform API
what_it_does: SaaS management platform with REST API — discovering all applications via SSO integration, expense parsing, and browser extension, managing user access and license utilization, automating IT workflows (onboarding, offboarding, license changes), tracking renewals, and providing spend optimization recommendations for IT teams.
use_cases: Querying discovered SaaS application inventory including shadow IT for IT audits
Monitoring license utilization and identifying unused seats for cost reclamation
Integrating Zluri offboarding workflows with HRIS for automated deprovisioning
Pulling renewal calendar and spend data for IT procurement planning
Managing SaaS access provisioning workflows triggered by employee events
not_for: Cloud IaaS cost optimization for AWS/Azure/GCP (use Vantage or nOps)
Enterprise software license compliance for on-prem (use Flexera)
Deep usage analytics at feature level (use Productiv for feature-level analysis)
best_when: An IT team wants comprehensive SaaS discovery including shadow IT, automated onboarding/offboarding workflows, and license optimization with strong integrations for Indian tech ecosystem companies.
avoid_when: You need deep feature-level usage analytics, cloud IaaS cost management, or on-premises software compliance.

auth.notes: API key from Zluri account settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for application discovery and workflow events. SSO (Okta, Google Workspace, Azure AD) and expense integrations for discovery. No OAuth2.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee pricing; contact sales for tiers
pricing.notes: Indian company (Bengaluru). Founded 2020. Raised $20M Series B (2022). YC W21. Browser extension for shadow IT discovery differentiator — catches apps not connected via SSO. Zluri Actions: workflow automation for access management. Multiple discovery vectors (SSO + expense + browser). Strong adoption in Indian tech and global SaaS companies.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for applications, users, licenses, and workflows. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. Browser extension discovery adds coverage beyond SSO. Workflow automation configured in Zluri UI — API triggers available. SSO and expense integrations configured in admin.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Application reads fully idempotent. User reads idempotent. License reads idempotent. Workflow status reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Browser extension deployment required for maximum shadow IT coverage
SSO integration required for user access mapping and license validation
Workflow automation built in Zluri UI — API triggers pre-configured workflows
Employee deprovisioning has access deletion consequences — implement safeguards
Indian company with US/EU data residency — verify data sovereignty requirements

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Browser extension has broad web activity access — review extension permissions carefully. Employee access data is sensitive HR/identity PII. Deprovisioning automation is production-consequence action — implement approval workflow. YC-backed company with investor security standards.
